$comment: Machine-readable identity manifest for the topo-v8 backend slot. Operational planning is governed by Plan 37 (track-based; no global startup gates). Not consumed by build today — exists so any tooling that walks topo-<backend>/ directories can answer 'what is this' and 'what's live'.
name: topo-v8
$status_meaning: lib/ shared AST infrastructure live; Track A complete (visibility + containment-guard + stage-assert all shipped 2026-05-11). Track T transpile-source extractor delivered 2026-05-16 (topo-extract-typescript, MVP). Track A's by-design correctness-pass candidates are exhausted — new candidates require a Plan 37 update first. Perf / FFI tracks open by demand.

tool.$comment: Separate v8-specific build backend is NOT implemented and not planned ahead. TS routes to the check-only topo-build-typescript; that backend orchestrates per-pass tools via [transforms.<name>] config. A second backend would only be considered if a single pass became too complex for the check-only driver to host (Plan 37 §4).
tool.name: topo-build-v8-typescript

contract_passes.$comment: Correctness-enforcement passes (Plan 37 Track A). Each lands as topo-v8/tools/<name>/ + a [transforms.<name>] config knob in topo-build-typescript.

transpile_source.$comment: Plan 37 Track T. The transpile-source extractor lifts TS into a TranspileModule so TS can be a `topo-transpile --from typescript` source. Lives in the per-language package (not topo-v8/tools/) because it is a topo-check/extractor sibling to topo-extract-cpp/rust/java, not a correctness-rewrite pass. Node-backed; resolved by the bare name topo-extract-typescript via a launcher staged beside topo-build-typescript.
transpile_source.name: topo-extract-typescript
transpile_source.scope: MVP — fn/method decls, params, return type, vardecl/assign/return/if/for/while, binary/unary ops, calls, member access, index, literals, self-update for-incrementor; async/await, decorators, generic constraints, destructuring, unions recorded to function `unsupported` with downgraded fidelity (never silently dropped)

artifacts_open_tracks.$comment: Per Plan 37 these are not pre-scaffolded. They land when the corresponding Track's trigger fires. Track A's correctness-pass list is empty: the three originally-listed candidates (visibility / containment-guard / stage-assert) have all shipped; future Track A candidates require a Plan 37 update first.
